en_title: OnePlus Is Exiting the US Market
cn_title: 一加退出美国和欧洲手机市场
subtitle: 老用户仍获支持
opus_summary: 一加将退出美国和欧洲手机市场，不再在当地推出新机。现有设备仍将获得软件、安全和售后支持，但美国社区论坛将在2026年8月16日关闭。

paragraphs.en: The maker of the best Android phone around – the OnePlus 15 – is not long for these shores. OnePlus has announced that it is departing the U.S. and European mobile phone markets. That means none of its new phones will be released in either market, although you'll still be able to buy existing for-sale models while their stock holds out.
paragraphs.cn: 目前最出色的Android手机——一加15——的制造商即将告别欧美市场。一加宣布退出美国和欧洲手机市场，这意味着其新机将不再于这两个市场发售，不过在现有库存售罄前，消费者仍可购买目前在售的机型。

paragraphs.en: It's not all bad news for current OnePlus owners. The company says that, where applicable, devices already out in the wild "will keep getting the software updates, security patches, and after-sales support." OnePlus' customer support will remain available, it will honor existing warranties, and repair services will stay available to OnePlus owners . Users will still be able to update to the next version of the phone's custom Android version, ColorOS 17, but only if their phone is already supported.
paragraphs.cn: 对现有一加用户而言，消息并非全是坏事。一加表示，在适用情况下，已经售出的设备「将继续获得软件更新、安全补丁和售后支持」。一加客服将继续提供服务，现有保修仍然有效，维修服务也会继续向用户开放。已在支持名单中的手机仍可升级至下一版定制Android系统ColorOS 17。

paragraphs.en: Unfortunately, the company is shuttering the U.S. version of its community forums, starting on August 16, 2026. The company says posts will be unavailable after that, so users who want to keep theirs will have to "save them manually before that date."
paragraphs.cn: 遗憾的是，一加将从2026年8月16日起关闭美国版社区论坛。公司表示，届时论坛帖子将无法访问，因此希望保留自己帖子的用户必须「在该日期前手动保存」。

paragraphs.en: This also means that we'll be on the hunt for a new favorite smartphone. Samsung will take a crack at that title next week when it's expected to unveil the next iteration of the Galaxy Z Flip and Z Fold devices. Meanwhile, the Pixel 11 will take the stage at the next Made by Google event on August 12.
paragraphs.cn: 这也意味着我们得另寻新的心仪手机。三星预计将在下周发布新一代Galaxy Z Flip和Galaxy Z Fold设备，向这一位置发起挑战。与此同时，Pixel 11将于8月12日的下一场Made by Google活动上亮相。
